title: The Techno Totem
description: Technoblade never dies, not even close baby!
body: The Techno Totem pack retextures the totem of undying to look like Technoblades skin, and when the totem pops you hear the iconic voice of Techno saying "Technoblade never dies, not even close baby!" Sarcoma killed Technoblade and if you want to donate to the research a cure please visit [here.](https://curesarcoma.org/ways-to-help/honor-memorial-giving/dedications/technoblade/)
